# Real Image Fixtures

These fixtures are copied from the scikit-image sample data set, pinned to tag
`v0.25.2`, and are used to regression-test VibePalette's color sampling against
real photographic/texture inputs.

Sources:
- `coffee.png`
- `astronaut.png`
- `chelsea.png`
- `rocket.jpg`

License notes from the scikit-image data documentation:
- `coffee.png`: CC0 / no copyright restrictions by photographer Rachel Michetti.
- `astronaut.png`: no known copyright restrictions / public domain.
- `chelsea.png`: CC0 / no copyright restrictions by photographer Stefan van der Walt.
- `rocket.jpg`: SpaceX launch photo released in the public domain.

Reference:
https://github.com/scikit-image/scikit-image/tree/v0.25.2/skimage/data
